subject: Touch base DI
body:
Hi Darren
Your impressions of yesterday?
Are we ready with a first draft Term Sheet?
In IL culture TS drafts are treated as drafts. No more. Until final one is mutually agreed and signed. 
Pl let me know. 
EB

Sent from my iPhone
